share.title: Share "{name}"
share.previewHint: Choose a complete project package or select only the pages the recipient should see.
share.limitReached: Active share links are capped at {limit}.
share.completePackageDesc: Share every public project page as one polished dossier.
share.customPackageDesc: Limit the link to specific pages and workflows.

sectionDescriptions.overview: School, program, professor, dates, progress, tags, and dossier cards.
sectionDescriptions.materials: Materials, statuses, file requests, recommenders, and material versions.
sectionDescriptions.tasks: Task checklist, due dates, details, and requested attachments.
sectionDescriptions.communications: Professor emails, messages, notes, dates, and summaries.
sectionDescriptions.funding: Scholarships, fee tracker, funding tasks, materials, and milestones.
sectionDescriptions.timeline: Application timeline with manual and shared-page milestones.
sectionDescriptions.versions: Uploaded file history and downloadable versions included in this project.

share.revokeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke this share link? Anyone with the link will lose access immediately.
